mapper.select: SELECT * FROM characters ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO characters ( name, ruby, real_age, look_age, gender, race, world_name, appearance, personality, ability, description ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{ruby}, #{realAge}, #{lookAge}, #{gender}, #{race}, #{worldName}, #{appearance}, #{personality}, #{ability}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE characters SET name = #{name}, ruby = #{ruby}, real_age = #{realAge}, look_age = #{lookAge}, gender = #{gender}, race = #{race}, world_name = #{worldName}, appearance = #{appearance}, personality = #{personality}, ability = #{ability}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
